description: Gladiator flats in supple suede with slim, elegant straps from catwalk. catwalk takes the gladiator sandal trend a notch higher with this buckled pair. Wear this lovely versatile pair with harem pants, denims or leggings and look perfect. This pair is cut to Fit your foot snugly without making it seem bulky. Grab them before its too late!UpperSuede upper with gladiator-style straps with metal rings on the middle for styleTwo straps looping around your ankle with a metal buckle closure for a customised fitHeel collar in suede with a vertical zipper for a snug fitCushioned footbed with stitch detailing in an ergonomic design for extra comfort and added styleOutsoleTPU outsole with upraised heelTextured design on forefoot  and heelshoe CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
